name: node-https-proxy-agent
title: node-https-proxy-agent
summary: HTTP(s) proxy http.Agent implementation for HTTPS
description:
HTTP(s) proxy http.Agent implementation for HTTPS
node-http-proxy-agent provides an http.Agent implementation that connects
to a specified HTTP or HTTPS proxy server, and can be used with the built-in
https module.
.
Specifically, this Agent implementation connects to an intermediary "proxy"
server and issues the CONNECT HTTP method, which tells the proxy to open a
direct TCP connection to the destination server.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-https-proxy-agent because HTTP(s) proxy http.Agent implementation for HTTPS.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-https-proxy-agent as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-https-proxy-agent with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-https-proxy-agent --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
